start.speaker: npc_blacksmith_valdombra
start.text: Well met, traveler. The forge is hot and the roads are dangerous. What can I do for you?

offer.speaker: npc_blacksmith_valdombra
offer.text: There's an old cave east of here. Inside lies a fragment of ancient iron - I need it for a commission. Bring it to me and I'll make it worth your while.

reminder.speaker: npc_blacksmith_valdombra
reminder.text: The fragment is still out there, in the cave to the east. Bring it back and the reward is yours.

thanks.speaker: npc_blacksmith_valdombra
thanks.text: That fragment was exactly what I needed. You have my thanks - and my forge, should you ever need it.

passing.speaker: npc_blacksmith_valdombra
passing.text: Then keep your blade close. The woods east of here have grown unfriendly of late.
